parameters.name: formula-section-0-input
parameters.value: IF ( ISNULL ( RLM_Distributor_Unit_Price__c ) , NetUnitPrice - ( ( NetUnitPrice * PartnerDiscountPercent ) / 100 ) , RLM_Distributor_Unit_Price__c - ( ( RLM_Distributor_Unit_Price__c * PartnerDiscountPercent ) / 100 ) )
